ksa_text: Skill in conducting operational process improvement for data workflows, including efficiency analysis, automation opportunity identification, redesign implementation, and outcome measurement.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA OP-S-008 (Operational Excellence) scores 0.445 composite (signal: weak). Scope fit for Cloud Data Architect: edge_case. Preliminary decision: include.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Edge-case scope, score 0.445 meets threshold. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support Operational Excellence KSA OP-S-008 as a discrete competency for Cloud Data Architect?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Reviewed against Cloud Data Architect market data. Operational content is program management/training, not cloud architecture. Score 0.445 with no role-specific keyword match confirms exclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Revised to exclude. Operational content is program management/training, not cloud architecture. Final decision: exclude.

decision_rationale: Pass 4 overturn: Operational content is program management/training, not cloud architecture.
